ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-19-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS NOB HILL MASONIC CENTER, INC. AND LIVE NATION WORLDWIDE, INC.'s Motion For Order Imposing Terminating And Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Request for dismissal re-filed on 1/4/21.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Continued To Feb-09-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Nob Hill Masonic Center, Inc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendant Nob Hill Masonic Center, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff Hussein O. Ali shall serve Code-compliant responses without objections except privilege, and any responsive documents, within 30 days' notice of order. Plaintiff Hussein O. Ali shall pay sanctions in the amount of $1,000 to Defendant Nob Hill Masonic Center, Inc.'s attorneys Dillingham & Murphy, LLP, which shall be stayed provided that Plaintiff Hussein O. Ali timely complies with this order.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
